programme.title: Abandoned Inventions
programme.desc: Tracking down forgotten ideas that have far-reaching consequences in the modern world; looking at a medieval steel formula that was accidentally rediscovered during the space race; seeing what a lost nuclear formula had to do with an oil rig disaster.

programme.title: Mysteries From Above
programme.desc: Over a hundred big concrete arrows scattered across the U.S.; a giant chalk figure with an oversized phallus on an English hillside; a mysterious hole in the middle of a lake in Southern California.

programme.title: Secrets In The Dark
programme.desc: Learn who sailed on a sunken, treasure-filled pirate ship and who invoked the devil on a medieval curse tablet; Investigate 17 mini-coffins that have puzzled Scottish historians since 1836 and look inside a mysterious well of bones in Athens.

programme.title: Buried Evidence
programme.desc: Learning how displaced artifacts spark fresh investigations and rewrite timelines; unearthing a forgotten tragedy in a remote mountain lake in India, checking out footprints that change human migration stories; reopening an ancient cold case.

programme.title: Wild Rose Vets
